document_name: Disney and 21st Century Fox Final Merger Terms and Asset Division

document_sentence_array.text: The global media industry is undergoing a period of intense consolidation as traditional studios compete with emerging tech-led streaming services.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal steering committee notes from this evening confirm the final exchange ratio has been set at 0.2745 Disney shares for each Fox share.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Walt Disney Company has previously integrated large-scale acquisitions such as Pixar and Marvel Entertainment into its studio system.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Legal advisors anticipate that the acquisition of 22 regional sports networks will require specific divestiture agreements to satisfy US antitrust regulators.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The secret 'Project 21' agreement specifies that Disney will assume approximately $13.7 billion of 21st Century Fox's net debt as part of the transaction.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: 21st Century Fox operates a diverse array of cable networks, film studios, and international satellite television holdings.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The unannounced plan involves spinning off the Fox Broadcasting network and Fox News into a newly formed, independent 'New Fox' entity prior to the merger.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Media analysts have spent the quarter speculating on whether Comcast will submit a superior all-cash bid to disrupt the Disney negotiations.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential financial projections indicate that the addition of Fox's 30% stake in Hulu will grant Disney a 60% controlling interest in the platform.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Rupert Murdoch has historically served as a central figure in the expansion of global news and entertainment media through the News Corp umbrella.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Private board resolutions passed this afternoon authorize Bob Iger’s contract extension through 2021 to oversee the complex post-merger integration.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance teams are monitoring internal communications for any unauthorized disclosure of the deal terms ahead of the 8:00 AM EST press release.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The 20th Century Fox film library includes iconic franchises such as Avatar, X-Men, and the original Star Wars distribution rights.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A secret 'Halt' order has been prepared for the NYSE to pause trading of DIS and FOXA shares tomorrow morning pending the material announcement.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Standard equity research reports have noted that the combined content library would provide a significant advantage in the upcoming 'streaming wars'.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Many legacy media companies are exploring cost-cutting measures to offset the decline in traditional linear television advertising revenue.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The confidential draft of the merger agreement includes a $2.5 billion breakup fee if the transaction is blocked by international regulatory bodies.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our internal analysts are currently calculating the pro-forma earnings per share impact based on the projected $2 billion in cost synergies.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Technological shifts in consumer behavior have led to a record number of 'cord-cutting' incidents across North American households.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence reveals that Disney plans to immediately re-brand the acquired Fox film studios to remove the 'Fox' name to avoid brand confusion.
document_sentence_array.label: High
